# Known Issues And Workarounds

Use this thread to track recurring public issues and temporary workarounds.

Suggested maintainer format for each entry:

## Title

- Status: investigating / mitigated / fixed
- Affected area:
- First observed in version:
- Symptoms:
- Temporary workaround:
- Tracking issue or follow-up discussion:

Update this post instead of scattering repeated answers across many threads.
